title: Scrollable detail modal and inline rail records
summary: Detail dialogs now keep long content scrollable within the modal, and the implementation rail displays Decisions and Risks inline instead of navigating to separate pages.
userVisibleChange: Users can scroll long implementation modal content and read decisions and risks directly in the side rail.

timeline.title: Constrained dialog content to a scrollable row
Rendered Decisions and Risks inline in the implementation rail
Verified Go tests and UI build

decisions.title: Keep Decisions and Risks in the rail
decisions.rationale: The user asked to remove page navigation for these sections and show their content directly where the summary already appears.

artifacts.description: Implementation modal with overflowing commit list before scroll behavior.
Decisions and Risks rail rows that previously linked to separate pages.
